zh.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Hamerton於1425年出生在英國藍卡爾時，她的父親Sir Laurence Hamerton45歲，母親Isabel Tempest42歲。她和Sir John Mallory至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Hamerton于1425年出生在英国藍卡爾时，她的父亲Sir Laurence Hamerton45岁，母亲Isabel Tempest42岁。她和Sir John Mallory至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Hamerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hammerton
meanings: English: habitational name, usually from Hammerton Green (Yorkshire) and occasionally perhaps from Hamerton (Huntingdonshire), each of which probably derives from Old English hamor, denoting some sort of plant such as hammer-wort, + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Hamerton was born in 1425, in Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Laurence Hamerton, was 45 and her mother, Isabel Tempest, was 42. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Sir John Mallory.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Hamerton est née en 1425, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Laurence Hamerton, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Isabel Tempest, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Sir John Mallory.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Hamerton 1425 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Laurence Hamerton 45 und ihre Mutter Isabel Tempest 42. Sie hatte mit Sir John Mallory mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Hamerton è nata il nel 1425 nel Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Laurence Hamerton, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Isabel Tempest, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Sir John Mallory.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Hamertonが1425年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Laurence Hamertonは45歳，母Isabel Tempestは42歳であった。彼女はSir John Malloryとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Hamerton(이)가 1425년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Laurence Hamerton(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Tempest(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Mallory(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Hamerton nasceu em 1425, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Laurence Hamerton, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Tempest, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Sir John Mallory.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Hamerton родилась в 1425 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Laurence Hamerton было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Tempest, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Sir John Mallory.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Hamerton nació en 1425, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Laurence Hamerton, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Isabel Tempest, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Sir John Mallory.
